prompt: Create a vertical anime-style street fashion illustration of a young woman with pale skin and long silver-white hair standing in the middle of a busy modern Japanese city crossing, surrounded by softly blurred pedestrians and tall buildings covered in colorful billboards. She wears an oversized black zip-up hoodie with cat-ear hood, red piping, white drawstrings, patch emblems on the chest and sleeve, and bulky sleeves, a red graphic T-shirt with a simple white skull-like mascot face, and loose black cargo pants with a small red accent at the waistband. Her hood is up, forming sharp black cat ears, with a small ahoge strand of hair at the top and white hair falling around her shoulders; her face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque pale beige square censor block. Pose her walking toward the viewer with a relaxed urban attitude, holding a black umbrella handle in one hand and a glossy black handbag in the other. Use a bright daytime Shibuya-like setting with crosswalk lines, glass towers, red and blue signage, atmospheric haze, depth of field, soft rim lighting, clean linework, smooth cel shading, fashionable youth-culture mood, and a polished GPT-image-2 anime illustration look.
